lastReviewSummary: Reviewed 20 substantive sessions from May 22-30. Key themes: (1) Content pipeline rebuilt to event-driven Slack review loop (May 28) — approve via 👍, auto-replenish next draft, calendar stacking. (2) Content quality purge (May 26) — 46/72 drafts killed, 3 pipeline quality fixes (thesis dedup, Sid-angle enforcement, QA judge upgrade). (3) Dashboard features — unschedule button, calendar tab, delete endpoint. (4) GBrain doctor fix (May 30) — 18 unreachable skills added to AGENTS.md, 12 MECE_GAP triggers added, score now 55/100 with 0 errors. (5) Bug fixes: qa-judge.js main() auto-executing at import time, approve.js Postiz scheduling. Updated MEMORY.md with event-driven architecture, quality purge, and GBrain stats.
